title: Gatterweld
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Gatterweld |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Black |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Zsinj's Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Gatterweld, I'm going to make you a very rich man.''"
"''I don't care about that, sir. I'm just doing my duty.|Warlord Zsinj and Gatterweld|''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]''}} '''Gatterweld''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]], and later an [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] in the forces of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. ==Biography== A tall and muscular [[Human/Legends|Human]] with a black hair just a little longer than regulation allowed, Gatterweld was adept at hand-to-hand combat. He was generally solemn and non-conversational. As a stormtrooper, Gatterweld was assigned to the security detail of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Razor's Kiss]]'' when it was under construction at [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. He was present when Zsinj made his attempt to capture the [[Warship/Legends|warship]]. After Zsinj's infiltration team got the ship under way, Gatterweld took control of the auxiliary bridge to try to regain command of the ship. But as ''Razor's Kiss'' was being pounded by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Solo Fleet|fleet]], Gatterweld decided that he'd rather see Zsinj take command of the ship than let the Rebels destroy it. He contacted [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] to offer Zsinj his assistance, and Zsinj tried to have his crew talk Gatterweld through the process of slaving the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] of ''Razor's Kiss'' to ''Iron Fist''. Gatterweld was unsuccessful in his attempt to save ''Razor's Kiss'', but he somehow escaped the destruction of the ship and was recovered by Zsinj's forces. Zsinj accepted Gatterweld into his fleet, and commissioned him as an Ensign on ''Iron Fist''. He learned how to pilot some shuttles, but didn't have quick enough reflexes to be a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot. Ensign Gatterweld was assigned to escort [[Gara Petothel]] after she "defected" to the Warlord's side. He followed Petothel like a shadow, until she made her escape from ''Iron Fist'' at the [[Battle of Selaggis]]. Petothel and her group of [[Project Chubar]] escapees subdued and bound Gatterweld and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Melvar]], and left them on the flight deck as they departed. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Gatterweld }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Personnel of Zsinj's empire]] [[Category:Stormtroopers of the Galactic Empire]]
